name: Lamb & Grilled Onion Taco W/Fresh Mint & Tomato Salsa (Gc)
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces lamb or grilled lamb scraps
1 large red onion, sliced thin and grilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal grill and allow it to burn down to embers.
2. Marinate the lamb in red chile marinade for 1 hour.
3. Grill the lamb for 3 minutes on each side, then cut into 24 slices.
4. For each serving, place four slices of lamb over half of a tortilla, sprinkle with ¼ cup cheese.
5. Top with grilled onions and mint. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Fold the tortilla over the ingredients and brush with olive oil.
7. Grill for 3 minutes on each side or until crispy and the cheese has melted.
Serve with Tomato Salsa (recipe follows).
